Pointblank Validation
A very simple example.

data frame patients
STEP COLUMNS VALUES TBL EVAL UNITS PASS FAIL W S N EXT

1

All variables must be between 1900 - today's date

col_vals_between()

▮birthdate

[1900-01-01, 2026-03-09]

 ✓ 7K 7K
1.00		 0
0.00		 — — — —

 2

All variables must be between 1900 - today's date

col_vals_between()

▮deathdate

[1900-01-01, 2026-03-09]

 ✓ 7K 7K
1.00		 0
0.00		 — — — —

 3

The death date must happen after the birth date

col_vals_gte()

▮deathdate

~birthdate

 ✓ 7K 7K
1.00		 0
0.00		 — — — —

 4

SSN must follow the format xxx-xx-xxxx

col_vals_regex()

▮ssn

[0-9]{3}-[0-9]{2}-[0-9]{4}$

 ✓ 7K 7K
1.00		 0
0.00		 — — — —

 5

The patient ID becomes an integer value

col_is_integer()

▮id

— ✓ 1 0
0.00		 1
1.00		 — — — —

 6

Marital status must be either single, married, divorced, widowed

col_vals_in_set()

▮marital

single, married, divorced, widowed

 ✓ 7K 0
0.00		 7K
1.00		 — — —

7

Gender must be either male (M) or female (F)

col_vals_in_set()

▮gender

M, F

 ✓ 7K 7K
1.00		 0
0.00		 — — — —

 8

Birthdate must be between 1900 and today, not resonable for someone being born before

col_vals_between()

▮birthdate

[1900-01-01, 2026-03-09]

 ✓ 7K 7K
1.00		 0
0.00		 — — — —
2026-03-09 14:32:38 CET 1.3 s 2026-03-09 14:32:39 CET
